settings.title: Size & Fit Guide
settings.content:
Find Your Perfect Fit

Unsure about sizing? Here's how to choose the right size:

  • Take Accurate Measurements: Measure your chest, waist, and hip using a measuring tape
  • Compare with Our Charts: Check our detailed size charts for each product
  • Consider Your Preference: Some prefer tight, some prefer loose fits—account for this
  • Check Reviews: Customer reviews often mention how items fit

Our Return Policy

Not happy with the fit? No problem! We offer 30-day returns on all fashion items—even if worn once, as long as they're in original condition. Free return shipping for orders over Rs 2,000.

Fabric Care Tips

  • Cotton & Blends: Machine wash in cold water, air dry
  • Silk & Delicates: Hand wash or use delicate cycle
  • Denim: Turn inside out before washing, wash separately first few times
  • Synthetic: Follow tag instructions, typically cool wash safe
